title: The Broken Script: Reprogrammed
description: Here I am. A mod that adds new mobs and dimensions to add on to The Broken Script.
body:
Here I am.![One of the entities added by the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a9fd1780e13bf06242c53de1ada27794db48e04_0.webp)

Notes:
This mod has loud noises
This mod can be buggy at times
I AM NOT AFFILIATED WITH THE DEVELOPERS OF THE BROKEN SCRIPT
This mod can kick and ban you from your world (toggleable in config)
Versions 0.4+ require Configured for the config to work



Features:
Entities: This mod adds lots of new entities, some are harmless, some want to kill.

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Curiosity: Appears in caves and is hostile to players.
Error 422: Also appears in caves and is neutral towards players.
Integrity: Appears on the surface and also hostile to players.
The World's End: Void creature that also appears on the surface and is hostile to players.
The Lost Memory: Also appears on the surface and also hostile to players.
Corrupted Souls: Appears on the surface and hostile to players.

</details>







Q&A:

Q: How do I toggle kicking / banning ?

A: Go in the config and look for an option named "Kicking" or "Banning" "

Q: Why isn't the config showing up?

A: Install Configured, then restart the game.

Q: Why did I hear a bell resonate noise? I'm not close to a village or bell.

A: <o>
